title: Void Firmament
description: Void Firmament expands upon the existing magic system in survival minecraft by adding an ancient tome of an unknown language as a rare loot in ancient cities and end cities.
body:
*What is reality? The void suspends and contains the earth and it's firmament, but what suspends and contains the void and it's metaphorical firmament?I dont't know, but the guys who made this reality bending tome sure did.*



### The Tome Offers: 
1. Alteration of Soul
2. Summoning of Matter
3. Alteration of Matter
4. Transmutation of Matter
5. Warping of Reality


## Features
Void Firmament expands upon the existing magic system in survival minecraft, with out making the existing system of potions and enchanting redundant. This is achieved by making an ancient tome of an unknown language a rare loot in ancient cities and end cities. The tome and it's spells are designed to be both lore-friendly and balanced.
- Amethyst Shards can now be infused with levels through the tome to Soul Gems, and are used to cast various powerful and not so powerful spells; all with sound and particle effects.
- Bottles can also be infused to Bottles o' Enchanting, with higher yields the more is infused.
- Infuse Gold Ingots to create Totems of Undying and Totems of Rebirth (returns player to spawnpoint).
- Transmute items in the tome with Lapis Lazuli, which retains it's role as a magic focus item.
- New items are added through "Tranfiguring", which gives various powerful effects upon use.
- A new pocket dimension, Void, is added through the tome. One block equals 64 in the overworld.
Warping between Lodestones.

<details>
<summary>Flip Through the Tome</summary>

![page1](https://i.imgur.com/10uGRid.png)
![page2](https://i.imgur.com/wPspwF3.png)
![page3](https://i.imgur.com/xMIrPyG.gif)
![page4](https://i.imgur.com/YtbxgdH.gif)
![page5](https://i.imgur.com/kjZ0hRc.gif)
</details>

<details>
<summary>List of All Spells</summary>

<details>
<summary>Page 1 - Alteration of Soul</summary>

- Infuse amethyst shards - 3 tiers
- Infuse bottles - 3 tiers
- Create totem of undying
- Create totem of rebirth
- Summon Vex
- Summon Allay
- Saturation - 2 tiers
- Heal self - 2 tiers
- Heal other
- Damage other - 3 tiers
- Clear all effects
</details>

<details>
<summary>Page 2 - Summoning of Matter</summary>

- Warp to Nether
- Give fire charge
- Summon Ghast
- Summon Blase
- Summon Wither Skeleton
- Summon Magma Cube
- Explode - 3 tiers
- Fireball - 3 tiers
- Lightning - 3 tiers
</details>

<details>
<summary>Page 3 - Alteration of Matter</summary>

- Warp to Overworld
- Speed for 2 min
- Strength for 2 min
- Jump boost for 2 min
- Resistance for 2 min
- Absorption for 2 min
- Fire Resistance for 2 min
- Water Breathing for 2 min
- Invisibility for 2 min
- Dolphins Grace for 2 min
- Luck for 2 min
- Night Vision for 2 min
</details>

<details>
<summary>Page 4 - Transmutation of Matter</summary>

- Transmute Coal to Diamond
- Transmute Flint to Emerald
- Transmute Gold Ingots to Netherite ingot
- Transmute Glowstone Dust to Gunpowder
- Transmute Copper ingots to Iron ingots
- Transmute Iron Ingots to Gold Ingots
- Enchant Book with Vanishing
- Enchant Book with Binding
- Enchant Book with Mending
- Transfigure Wither Skeleton Skull to Cursed Skull
- Transfigure Ender Pearl to Orb of Hovering
- Transfigure Leather Boots to Boots of Levitation
- Transfigure Soul Lantern to Eternal Soul Lantern
</details>

<details>
<summary>Page 5 - Warping of Reality</summary>

- Warp to Void (pocket dimension)
- Warp other to Void
- Warp to lodestone (lodestone compass in right hand, must stand on lodestone)
- Teleport 100 blocks up
- Teleport 100 blocks down
- Teleport 100 blocks forward
- Teleport 100 blocks to cursor
- Hover permanently
- Hover for 2 min
- Slow falling permanently
- Slow falling for 2 min
- Levitate and then slowfalling for 10 seconds
- Warp other into ground
- Summon Enderman
- Give ender pearl
</details>

</details>



<details>
<summary>Transfigured Items</summary>

<details>
<summary>Orb of Hovering</summary>

When held in main-hand makes you hover. 
![Picture of hovering](https://i.imgur.com/kzsDEsH.gif)

When held in off-hand makes you levitate. 
![Picture of levitation](https://i.imgur.com/JkrI7Ss.gif)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Boots of Levitation</summary>

Gives you permanent slow falling, and makes you levitate upwards when you step on certain blocks:
- Small Amethyst bud - 10 blocks
- Medium Amethyst bud - 20 blocks
- Large Amethyst bud - 30 blocks
- Amethyst cluster - 40 blocks
- Chiseled stone bricks - 64 blocks

![Picture of launcher](https://i.imgur.com/NnzT6ts.gif)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Eternal Soul Lantern</summary>

Gives nightvision when held in off-hand

![Picture of lantern](https://i.imgur.com/2PcT5S1.gif)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Cursed Skull</summary>

Boosts your speed by 50%, but gives you glow and invisibility when worn.

![Picture of skull](https://i.imgur.com/wL3H9bt.gif)

</details>

</details>


<details>
<summary>How to Use the Tome</summary>

- Infuse amethyst shards in your offhand to soul gems through the book.
- Hold Soul Gems in your offhand while using the tome to cast spells.
- Lodestone warping requires soul gems in the offhand, and the compass in the mainhand. The tome must be on a lectern to be used with both hands occupied, and the warping requires you to stand on a lodestone.
- Transfiguring requires Lapis Lazuli in the offhand, and the object of transfigurement in the mainhand. The tome must be on a lectern to be used with both hands occupied.

</details>
